assertions.description: Profiler is exposed on the main thread window object.
Profiler is a constructor function on the main thread.
Spawning a Dedicated Worker verifies that the Profiler interface is exposed inside the worker global scope.
assertions.test: (async () => { if (typeof Worker === 'undefined') return false; try { const w = new Worker('data:application/javascript,postMessage("Profiler" in self)'); const result = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => { w.onmessage = (e) => resolve(e.data); w.onerror = (e) => reject(e); setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("Timeout")), 2000); }); w.terminate(); return result; } catch(e) { return false; } })()

assertions.description: Constructing a Profiler without a document policy or user activation (as appropriate) throws a SecurityError.
